title: Physician navigation to nodule demonstration
description: Demonstrate end-to-end navigation of a bronchoscope model to a target nodule in a phantom airway; pass if scope reaches target generation depth without operator-reported navigation confusion.
notes: Covers UN-001; demonstration-level verification of user need

title: Peripheral airway reach demonstration
description: Demonstrate navigation to a target placed in a generation 4 or deeper airway branch in a phantom; pass if target is reached without manual repositioning.
notes: Covers UN-002; demonstration of peripheral reach capability

title: No unintended airway contact demonstration
description: Operate the system in a soft-tissue phantom and confirm no guidance commands are issued that result in scope contact with airway walls during nominal navigation; pass if zero wall-contact events are logged.
notes: Covers UN-003; demonstration of safety user need

title: Operator pause and abort demonstration
description: Operator issues PAUSE then ABORT commands during active navigation; pass if system responds visibly within 2 seconds and scope motion ceases.
notes: Covers UN-004; demonstration of supervisory authority user need

title: Procedure log review
description: Following a simulated procedure session, inspect the generated procedure log for completeness; pass if log contains all state transitions, replanning events, fault events, and tip pose trace.
notes: Covers UN-005; inspection-level verification of record-keeping user need

title: Navigation to target pulmonary nodule
description: Execute a full simulated navigation session from IDLE to target confirmation in a representative airway phantom; pass if the bronchoscope tip reaches within the biopsy zone of the target nodule.
notes: Covers SYS-REQ-001; analysis of reach capability against system-level requirement

title: Positional confidence at target location
description: At target confirmation, verify that the displayed tip position estimate uncertainty is within the biopsy zone diameter; pass if the uncertainty ellipsoid semi-axis is smaller than the nodule approach corridor.
notes: Covers SYS-REQ-002; analysis of positional confidence at target

title: No wall-contact guidance commands issued
description: Monitor all guidance commands on IF-EX-04 during a full navigation session; pass if no command exceeds the configured safety envelope and no wall-contact event is recorded in the procedure log.
notes: Covers SYS-REQ-003; test of safety constraint at system level

title: Pause and abort command response time
description: Issue PAUSE then ABORT from operator console and measure elapsed time to guidance command cessation; pass if scope motion ceases within 2 seconds of each command.
notes: Covers SYS-REQ-004; system-level test of command response

title: Procedure record completeness
description: Inspect the procedure data recorder output after a session including navigation, a fault, and an abort; pass if all required event types are present with timestamps.
notes: Covers SYS-REQ-005; inspection of system-level record requirement

title: Navigation halt on accuracy loss
description: Simulate localization failure mid-navigation; pass if the system ceases issuing advance commands and transitions to FAULT state without issuing further motion commands.
notes: Covers SYS-REQ-006; system-level test of accuracy-loss response

title: Fused pose estimate rate at 30 Hz
description: Instrument the IF-01 output during a 60-second NAVIGATE session; pass if all inter-estimate intervals are 33 ms or less with no gap exceeding 100 ms.

title: Uncertainty ellipsoid field presence on IF-01
description: Inspect the IF-01 interface definition in the Papyrus model and registry; pass if uncertainty ellipsoid semi-axes are defined as typed FlowProperties on IF_01_FusedPose and flagged as mandatory.

title: CBCT registration within 4 seconds
description: Inject a synthetic CBCT volume and measure elapsed time to registration confidence score output on IF-06; pass if result is 4 seconds or less.

title: Replanning inhibited when uncertainty exceeds threshold
description: Set tip position uncertainty above the configured replanning threshold and confirm no replanning requests appear on IF-02 and no HOLD-cleared guidance commands are transmitted; pass if both conditions hold throughout the elevated-uncertainty period.

title: Replanning threshold modifiable without rebuild
description: Modify the replanning threshold in the configuration file, restart the system without recompiling, and confirm the new threshold governs inhibition behavior; pass if the new threshold is observed to be active.

title: HOLD command within one guidance cycle of threshold exceedance
description: Drive tip uncertainty above the threshold and measure time to HOLD flag on IF-07; pass if HOLD flag is set within 33 ms of threshold exceedance.

title: Guidance command magnitude clamping
description: Command advance rate and steering angle values above the configured envelope limits; pass if all values transmitted on IF-07 are clamped to configured maximums and no out-of-envelope value is observed.

title: Procedure state machine full transition coverage
description: Execute all defined transitions including nominal sequence (IDLE to NAVIGATE to CONFIRM to BIOPSY to IDLE), fault injection (to FAULT), and operator abort (to ABORT to FinalState); pass if all transitions execute correctly and state is logged at each step.

title: Supervisor external interface routing inspection
description: Inspect D4 IBD in the Papyrus model; pass if no external interface connectors terminate directly on LocalizationTracking or ImageProcessingRegistration except IF-EX-02a (to ImageProcessingRegistration), IF-EX-03, and IF-EX-08 (both to LocalizationTracking).

title: Lost-tracking alert within 100 ms
description: Simulate simultaneous failure of all localization sources; measure time from failure event to lost-tracking alert on IF-03; pass if alert appears within 100 ms.

title: Guidance command cessation within 50 ms of interlock deassert
description: Assert then deassert the motion enable signal on IF-EX-06a; monitor IF-EX-04 output; pass if no guidance commands are transmitted more than 50 ms after the deassert edge.

title: FAULT state and HOLD within 100 ms of lost-tracking
description: Inject a lost-tracking alert on IF-03; pass if the Procedure Supervisor transitions to FAULT state and IF-EX-04 carries the HOLD flag within 100 ms of the alert.

title: Degraded pose estimate on single-source failure
description: Disable proprioceptive, vision, and registration sources one at a time; pass if a fused pose estimate is output in each case and IF-03 tracking status reflects DEGRADED rather than LOST.

title: Path computation within 1 second on target change
description: Issue a new target command via IF-04 and measure time to first updated waypoint on IF-02; pass if result is 1 second or less.

title: End-to-end guidance latency budget analysis
description: Construct a latency budget summing IF-01 delivery age, path updater processing, guidance command generation, IF-07 transport, Supervisor forwarding, and IF-EX-04 transport; pass if total is 200 ms or less and all component estimates are supported by measured data.

title: CBCT trigger issued only in NAVIGATE and CONFIRM
description: Cycle through all procedure states and monitor IF-EX-02b; pass if acquisition triggers are observed only during NAVIGATE and CONFIRM and are absent in all other states.

title: Procedure event log completeness and timestamp resolution
description: Execute a session with at least one state transition, replanning event, fault event, and navigation segment; inspect the procedure log; pass if all event types are present with timestamps at 10 ms resolution or better.

title: Tip articulation range kinematic analysis
description: Perform kinematic reach analysis against a representative segmented airway centerline dataset to compute the minimum tip articulation envelope required to traverse the tightest branch curvature on any path to a reachable target; pass if the output value is documented and populates the TBD field in COMP-REQ-001.
notes: Covers COMP-REQ-001; analysis verification; prerequisite: airway centerline geometry dataset

title: EKF uncertainty ellipsoid bound analysis
description: Perform EKF covariance propagation analysis parameterized by FK drift rate and vision update rate between CBCT corrections to compute the maximum 95% confidence volume under nominal operating conditions; pass if result is documented and populates the TBD field in COMP-REQ-002.
notes: Covers COMP-REQ-002; analysis verification; prerequisite: FK drift and vision rate characterization data

title: Replanning threshold parametric analysis
description: Perform parametric analysis relating airway diameter at representative branch points to the maximum tolerable position uncertainty before a guidance command risks wall contact; pass if the default threshold value is documented and populates the TBD field in COMP-REQ-003.
notes: Covers COMP-REQ-003; analysis verification; prerequisite: airway geometry dataset and tissue clearance tolerance
